web.title: Get tick size - Polymarket Documentation
web.description: Retrieves the minimum tick size (price increment) for a specific token ID. The tick size can be provided either as a query parameter or as a path parameter.

web.title: Get tick size by path parameter - Polymarket Documentation
web.description: Retrieves the minimum tick size (price increment) for a specific token ID using the token ID as a path parameter.

web.title: Orderbook - Polymarket Documentation
web.description: The tick_size_change event is critical for trading bots. If the tick size changes and you continue using the old tick size, your orders will be rejected.
